TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID

So, on the platform, a product is categorized by linking the product record to a category in TB_CATEGORY, and categories themselves can roll up into parent categories via PARENT_CATEGORY_ID. The context also states that a product must have “a valid category before being sold.”
